response.original_title: 超美裸体の人妻 Madonna専属第4弾!! ヌードモデルNTR 上司と羞恥に溺れた妻の衝撃的浮気映像
response.overview: "Okay, if it's for your own good," I thought. Was I wrong to take advantage of my wife's kindness? I was given the opportunity to work with popular photographer Tamado Otsuka, but on the day of the shoot...the female model couldn't be contacted, and despite contacting several modeling agencies, there was no sign of a substitute model being found. At that point, my boss, Mr. Oki, lost patience and told me to call my wife. What was supposed to be a one-time substitute shoot suddenly turned into something more when the photographer, who had taken a liking to my wife, asked to take more in-depth photos of her.
response.title: The fourth installment of Madonna's exclusive series featuring a stunningly beautiful naked housewife!! Nude model NTR: Shocking footage of a wife's affair with her boss, consumed by shame.
